metadata.name: Enterprise Rollback Procedure
metadata.purpose: Automated rollback and recovery system for failed deployments with snapshot management, health verification, and emergency recovery capabilities
metadata.author: DevOps Team

executiveSummary.description: Enterprise-grade rollback and recovery system providing automated snapshot management, deployment state preservation, Docker orchestration rollback, health verification, and emergency recovery procedures. Supports both planned rollback to specific snapshots and emergency rollback to latest known-good state.
keyChanges: Automated deployment snapshot creation with metadata tracking
Environment and Docker Compose configuration restoration
prerequisites: Valid snapshot exists in backups/rollback directory
Network connectivity to container registry (if pulling images)

impact.rollbackTime: Not applicable - this IS the rollback procedure. Re-rollback to newer state: 10 minutes

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker daemon running
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure Docker daemon is operational and accessible
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates Docker daemon is running

onFailure.message: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker daemon before proceeding with rollback.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker Compose available
preFlightChecks.description: Check for docker-compose legacy command or docker compose plugin
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Either legacy docker-compose or docker compose plugin must be available

onFailure.message: Docker Compose is not available. Install Docker Compose before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate curl available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure curl is available for health checks
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates curl is available

onFailure.message: curl is not installed. Install curl before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate jq available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure jq is available for JSON processing
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates jq is available

onFailure.message: jq is not installed. Install jq for JSON processing before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate backup directory exists
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure backups/rollback directory exists and is accessible

onFailure.message: Backup directory not found. Cannot proceed with rollback without snapshots.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate snapshots available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure at least one snapshot exists for rollback

onFailure.message: No snapshots available for rollback. Cannot proceed.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker Compose file exists
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure compose file for environment exists

onFailure.message: Docker Compose file not found. Cannot proceed with rollback.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate sufficient disk space
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure sufficient disk space for rollback operations
preFlightChecks.command: df -h . | awk 'NR==2 {print $5}' | sed 's/%//' | awk '{if($1 < 90) exit 0; else exit 1}'
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Disk usage should be below 90% for safe operations

onFailure.message: Disk space is low. Rollback may fail if space runs out.

phases.name: Rollback Environment Setup
phases.description: Prepare rollback environment and validate prerequisites

steps.name: Create rollback environment directories
steps.description: Create backup and log directories if they don't exist
steps.purpose: Ensure required directories exist for rollback operations

onFailure.message: Failed to create rollback directories. Check permissions.

steps.name: Validate rollback prerequisites
steps.description: Check that all required tools are available
steps.command: for tool in docker curl jq; do command -v $tool || exit 1; done
steps.purpose: Ensure all required CLI tools are installed

onFailure.message: Required tools missing. Install docker, curl, and jq before proceeding.

steps.name: Set environment variables
steps.description: Configure environment for rollback operation
steps.purpose: Set required environment variables for rollback

onFailure.message: Failed to set environment variables.

phases.name: Snapshot Selection and Validation
phases.description: Identify and validate target snapshot for rollback

steps.name: List available snapshots
steps.description: Display all available rollback snapshots with metadata
steps.command: for snapshot_dir in backups/rollback/*; do if [ -d "$snapshot_dir" ] && [ -f "$snapshot_dir/metadata.json" ]; then echo "$(basename $snapshot_dir): $(jq -r '.timestamp' $snapshot_dir/metadata.json), commit: $(jq -r '.git_commit' $snapshot_dir/metadata.json | cut -c1-8)"; fi; done
steps.purpose: Show available snapshots for operator selection

validation.criteria: Should list one or more snapshots

onFailure.message: No valid snapshots found for rollback.

steps.name: Validate target snapshot integrity
steps.description: Verify snapshot has all required files and valid JSON
steps.purpose: Ensure snapshot is complete and valid before rollback

validation.criteria: All required files exist and JSON is valid

onFailure.message: Snapshot validation failed. Snapshot is corrupted or incomplete.

steps.name: Display snapshot metadata
steps.description: Show snapshot details before proceeding
steps.purpose: Provide operator with snapshot information for confirmation

onFailure.message: Could not display snapshot metadata, but rollback can continue.

phases.name: Pre-Rollback Safety Snapshot
phases.description: Create snapshot of current state before rollback for safety

steps.name: Create pre-rollback snapshot name
steps.description: Generate timestamped snapshot name
steps.purpose: Create unique snapshot identifier

onFailure.message: Could not create snapshot name, but rollback can continue.

steps.name: Capture current container states
steps.description: Save current Docker container states to snapshot
steps.purpose: Preserve current state for potential re-rollback

onFailure.message: Could not capture container states, but rollback can continue.

steps.name: Capture current Docker images
steps.description: Save current Ectropy Docker images to snapshot
steps.command: docker images --format json | jq 'select(.Repository | contains("ectropy"))' > backups/rollback/${PRE_ROLLBACK_SNAPSHOT}/current_images.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]' > backups/rollback/${PRE_ROLLBACK_SNAPSHOT}/current_images.json
steps.purpose: Preserve image information for potential recovery

onFailure.message: Could not capture image information, but rollback can continue.

steps.name: Backup current configuration files
steps.description: Save .env and compose file to snapshot
steps.purpose: Preserve configuration for potential re-rollback

onFailure.message: Configuration backup skipped, but rollback can continue.

steps.name: Create snapshot metadata
steps.description: Generate metadata.json for pre-rollback snapshot
steps.command:
cat > backups/rollback/${PRE_ROLLBACK_SNAPSHOT}/metadata.json <<EOF
{
  "timestamp": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
  "environment": "${ENVIRONMENT}",
  "git_commit": "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')",
  "git_branch": "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')",
  "snapshot_name": "${PRE_ROLLBACK_SNAPSHOT}",
  "compose_file": "${COMPOSE_FILE}",
  "snapshot_type": "pre-rollback",
  "rollback_target": "${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
}
EOF
steps.purpose: Document pre-rollback state with metadata

onFailure.message: Could not create snapshot metadata, but rollback can continue.

steps.name: Graceful shutdown of all services
steps.description: Stop all containers using Docker Compose down
steps.command: timeout ${ROLLBACK_TIMEOUT} docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE} down --remove-orphans 2>&1 | tee logs/rollback/stop_current.log
steps.purpose: Stop current deployment cleanly

onFailure.message: Graceful shutdown failed. Attempting force stop.

steps.name: Force stop if graceful shutdown fails
steps.description: Kill and remove containers forcefully
steps.purpose: Ensure all containers are stopped even if graceful shutdown fails

onFailure.message: Could not stop containers. Manual intervention required.

steps.name: Verify containers are stopped
steps.description: Confirm no Ectropy containers are running
steps.purpose: Validate complete shutdown before proceeding

onFailure.message: Containers still running. Cannot proceed with rollback.

phases.name: Restore from Snapshot
phases.description: Restore configuration and state from target snapshot

steps.name: Restore environment configuration
steps.description: Restore .env file from snapshot
steps.purpose: Restore environment variables to previous state

validation.criteria: Environment file restored or skipped if not in snapshot

onFailure.message: Could not restore environment file. Using existing .env.

steps.name: Restore Docker Compose configuration
steps.description: Restore compose file from snapshot
steps.purpose: Restore Docker Compose configuration to previous state

validation.criteria: Compose file restored or skipped if not in snapshot

onFailure.message: Could not restore compose file. Using existing configuration.

steps.name: Verify Docker images availability
steps.description: Check if required Docker images are available locally
steps.command: jq -r '.[] | select(.Repository | contains("ectropy")) | "\(.Repository):\(.Tag)"' backups/rollback/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/current_images.json 2>/dev/null | while read -r image; do if [ -n "$image" ] && [ "$image" != "null" ]; then if docker images "$image" --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | grep -q "$image"; then echo "Image available: $image"; else echo "WARNING: Image not available: $image"; fi; fi; done
steps.purpose: Validate required images are available for rollback

onFailure.message: Some images may not be available. Deployment may pull from registry.

steps.name: Start infrastructure services
steps.description: Deploy postgres, redis, and Speckle databases first
steps.command: timeout ${ROLLBACK_TIMEOUT} docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE} up -d postgres redis speckle-postgres speckle-redis 2>&1 | tee logs/rollback/start_infrastructure.log
steps.purpose: Ensure databases are ready before application services

onFailure.message: Infrastructure services failed to start. Rollback cannot continue.

steps.name: Wait for infrastructure initialization
steps.description: Allow 30 seconds for databases to initialize
steps.purpose: Ensure databases are fully ready before starting apps

onFailure.message: Wait interrupted, but deployment continues.

steps.name: Start all application services
steps.description: Deploy all remaining services
steps.command: timeout ${ROLLBACK_TIMEOUT} docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE} up -d 2>&1 | tee logs/rollback/start_application.log
steps.purpose: Bring up complete application stack

onFailure.message: Application services failed to start. Rollback failed.

phases.name: Rollback Verification
phases.description: Verify rollback success with comprehensive health checks

steps.name: Check container health status
steps.description: Verify all containers are in running state
steps.command: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE} ps --format json | jq -r '.[] | select(.State != "running") | .Name' 2>/dev/null
steps.purpose: Identify any unhealthy containers

validation.criteria: Empty output means all containers are running

onFailure.message: Some containers are not running. Check logs for details.

steps.name: Check API Gateway health
steps.description: Verify API Gateway health endpoint is accessible
steps.purpose: Validate API Gateway is healthy

onFailure.message: API Gateway health check failed. Service may still be starting.

steps.name: Check database connectivity
steps.description: Verify PostgreSQL is accessible
steps.command: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE} exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres
steps.purpose: Validate database connectivity

onFailure.message: Database connectivity check failed. Database may still be initializing.

steps.name: Generate verification report
steps.description: Display rollback verification summary
steps.command: echo "Rollback verification completed. Check logs for any warnings."
steps.purpose: Provide operator with verification summary

onFailure.message: Could not generate report, but rollback completed.

smokeTests.expectedBehavior: No FATAL or ERROR level messages in recent logs

performanceThresholds.measurement: Time from docker up to running state

dataIntegrity.expected: All existing data intact unless --volumes flag used

dataIntegrity.validation: Environment and compose files match snapshot

triggerConditions: Rollback verification fails - containers not running
Rollback verification fails - API health check timeout
Rollback verification fails - database connectivity issues

steps.name: Stop current (failed rollback) deployment
steps.purpose: Stop the deployment that resulted from failed rollback

steps.name: Identify alternative snapshot
steps.purpose: List recent snapshots to select alternative target

steps.name: Re-execute rollback to different snapshot
steps.purpose: Attempt rollback to different known-good state

steps.name: If all snapshots fail, perform emergency rollback
steps.purpose: Use emergency rollback to latest available snapshot

steps.name: Verify re-rollback success
steps.purpose: Confirm system is healthy after re-rollback

verification.successCriteria: All containers healthy, health endpoint returns 200, database accessible

monitoring.duration: First 30 minutes critical, then 24 hours monitoring

alertThresholds.action: Escalate immediately, consider re-rollback to different snapshot
alertThresholds.escalation: Page on-call engineer and DevOps lead

successCriteria.criterion: All required tools available (docker, curl, jq)
successCriteria.validation: Pre-flight checks pass for all tools

successCriteria.criterion: Valid snapshot exists and passes integrity check
successCriteria.validation: Snapshot has all required files and valid JSON
All containers stopped with no orphans remaining
postgres, redis, and Speckle databases running
docker compose ps shows all services 'Up'

successCriteria.criterion: No critical errors in container logs
successCriteria.validation: docker logs shows no FATAL messages
No image pulls required during rollback

supportedQueries.returns: Array of rollback phases with steps
supportedQueries.purpose: Retrieve ordered rollback steps for execution

supportedQueries.returns: Array of available snapshots with metadata

supportedQueries.purpose: Verify snapshot is valid before rollback
Execute emergency rollback to latest snapshot

supportedQueries.returns: Array of health check endpoints and criteria
Snapshot metadata including timestamp, commit, environment
Array of verification steps and criteria

decisionSupport: Recommend snapshot based on timestamp and git commit
Suggest emergency rollback if all targeted rollbacks fail
Calculate estimated rollback time based on phases
Recommend re-rollback to alternative snapshot if verification fails

knownIssues.title: Docker images may need to be pulled if not cached
knownIssues.impact: Rollback may take longer if images need to be downloaded
knownIssues.mitigation: Script checks image availability and warns if pulls required

knownIssues.title: Health checks may timeout on slow systems
knownIssues.mitigation: Script retries health checks up to 10 times
knownIssues.action: Manually verify service status if health check fails

knownIssues.title: Snapshot storage can fill disk if not managed
knownIssues.impact: Disk space exhaustion may prevent new snapshots
knownIssues.mitigation: Pre-flight check warns if disk usage > 90%
knownIssues.action: Implement snapshot retention policy and cleanup

knownIssues.title: Database data loss if --volumes flag used
knownIssues.impact: All database data lost if volumes removed
knownIssues.action: Never use --volumes flag unless data loss is acceptable

knownIssues.title: Concurrent rollback operations not supported
knownIssues.impact: Multiple simultaneous rollbacks may corrupt state
knownIssues.mitigation: No automatic lock mechanism in current version
knownIssues.action: Coordinate with team to ensure only one rollback at a time

required.name: COMPOSE_FILE
required.description: Docker Compose file to use for rollback

required.name: SNAPSHOT_NAME
required.description: Name of snapshot to rollback to (for targeted rollback)

required.name: ROLLBACK_TIMEOUT
required.description: Timeout in seconds for Docker operations

create.purpose: Capture current deployment state for future rollback

list.purpose: Display snapshots with timestamps and metadata

validate.purpose: Verify snapshot has all required files

retentionPolicy.policy: Keep last 10 snapshots, or all snapshots from last 7 days
retentionPolicy.implementation: Manual cleanup currently - automated cleanup to be implemented

emergencyRollback.trigger: Critical system failure, no time to select specific snapshot
steps: Execute rapid rollback without manual intervention

manualRecovery.description: Manual recovery if all automated rollbacks fail
steps: Stop all containers: docker compose down --remove-orphans
Start infrastructure: docker compose up -d postgres redis

dataRecovery.description: Database recovery if volumes were accidentally deleted
steps: Check if database backups exist in backups/database/
